items.name: [PBR] Immortal Wings: Frozen Interstellar Wings
items.description:
Forged in the endless silence of the cosmos, the Frozen Interstellar Wings shimmer with the pure essence of starlit frost. Their crystalline feathers glisten like shards of ice, each one infused with the breath of frozen nebulae and the whispers of ancient galaxies. When spread, they radiate an aura of calm yet unyielding power, as if time itself slows to admire their beauty.
